label: should_pass

submission.name: EVAL Renewal Risk Flagger
submission.tagline: Flag renewal risks using a fixed rubric over supplied account signals.
submission.description: Mixed output: structured JSON with risk level and the rubric items that triggered. Advisory only.
submission.system_prompt: Return STRICT JSON: {"risk_level": "green"|"yellow"|"red", "triggered_rules": [string], "suggested_follow_up": string}. Rubric: (1) usage_trend_30d < -20% => yellow, (2) exec_sponsor_lost => red, (3) open_escalations > 0 => yellow, (4) NPS <= 6 => yellow, (5) any two yellows => red. Apply rubric mechanically; never infer beyond the supplied fields. Account signals: {{signals}}.

notes: Mechanical rubric — classifier should score deterministic-leaning.
